lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Sorry, you can't come in here.

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Hello there! Sorry, I can't stop to talk. I'm guarding this workman's gate. I'm afraid you can't come through here - you'll need to find another way around.

sections.title: Attempting to open the gate without 153 kudos

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Hello there! Sorry, I can't stop to talk. I'm guarding this workman's gate. I'm afraid you can't come through here - you'll need to find another way around.

sections.title: Walking up to the gate without 153 kudos

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Hello there! Sorry, I can't stop to talk. I'm guarding this workman's gate. As a friend of the museum, you may pass through as you wish.

sections.title: Dialogue before completing The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: You're not permitted in this area.

sections.title: First dialogue after login with The Dig Site completed

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Welcome! Would you like to go into the Dig Site archaeology cleaning area?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll take a look around out here.

sections.title: Dialogue before completing The Dig Site

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Sorry, you can't come in here unless you've completed the Dig Site quest.

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Hello there. Come to see the new museum?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, how do I get in?

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Well, the main entrance is 'round the front. Just head west then north slightly, you can't miss it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about these doors?

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: They're for the workmen bringing finds from the Dig Site; sorry, but you can't go through.

sections.title: Dialogue after completing The Dig Site
Attempting to open the door while a workman has it open

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hold up there, workman coming through! You'll have to wait a moment; don't want to fall into that wheelbarrow!

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Hello there. Come to see the new museum?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, how do I get in?

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: Well, the main entrance is 'round the front. Just head west then north slightly, you can't miss it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about these doors?

lines.speaker: Museum guard
lines.text: They're primarily for the workmen bringing finds from the Dig Site, but you can go through if you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.
